data.title: AVAX trades at $9.03, neutral RSI at 45.59. Analysts predict $10-12 range by April 2026, with potential breakout.
data.description: A cryptocurrency known as Avalanche (AVAX) is currently trading at $9.03, and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 45.59, indicating a neutral position. Technical analysis indicates a period of consolidation before a potential upward movement towards the $12 range. This aligns with forecasts made by analysts in the market.

data.title: $46.2M in ETH deployed across 11 deposits by Ethereum Foundation to speed up 70,000 ETH staking plan post BitMine sale.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has allocated a total of $46.2 million in ETH through 11 separate deposits. This move comes as part of their efforts to expedite a staking initiative involving a substantial amount of 70,000 ETH.

data.title: Polkadot aimed at $1.50 rebound from $1.28, supported by technical analysis anticipating breakout at $1.33 resistance. Risk at $1.20.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently at $1.28, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral stance and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) showing bearish signals. Analysts predict a potential uptrend to $1.50 if the crucial resistance level of $1.33 is breached. However, there is a downside risk to a support level of $1.20. Technical analysis hints at a possible recovery in the near future.

data.title: Midea Launches V9 VRF: Redefining Efficiency, Reliability and Easy Installation in Commercial HVAC
data.description: In Milan on March 30, 2026, Midea introduced the latest V9 VRF system to the market. This system caters to the pressing demand for energy conservation among owners. It also fulfills the high stability needed for critical applications and meets the continued desire for efficient installation processes. The V9 system offers a comprehensive solution to these requirements and more.

data.title: Polygon's MATIC eyes $0.45 recovery from $0.38, with RSI at 38.00 suggesting bounce from oversold levels.
data.description: Analysts predict that MATIC could potentially rebound to reach a resistance level of $0.45, with Polygon currently trading at $0.38. Technical analysis indicates a neutral RSI of 38.00, hinting at a potential uptick from oversold conditions.
